_meta.description: Comprehensive directory of Muslim/Islamic law solicitors for AskAdil referral system. Compiled from web audit of 8+ sources. DRAFT - firms must be contacted for consent before listing.
_meta.sources: Web research, Law Society, Muslim Connect, LinkedIn, muslimlawyer.co.uk, muslimsolicitors.co.uk, duncanlewis.co.uk, ascentimlegal.com, solicitorconnect.co.uk, shariahcouncil.org, iwillsolicitors.com, AML, MLAG, Muslim Lawyers Hub, 33+ individual firm websites
next_steps: Contact each firm to verify details and obtain consent to be listed
Confirm current team members (some may have left)
Ask about no-win-no-fee / legal aid arrangements
Get preferred contact method for AskAdil referrals
Verify SRA numbers where not found

key_findings.gap_analysis: No public searchable Muslim lawyer directory exists in the UK. AML, MLAG, and Muslim Lawyers Hub are networks without public directories. AskAdil would be first-of-its-kind.

firms.name: Rahman Lowe Solicitors
firms.notable: Legal 500 ranked. Handled Amnesty International Islamophobia case, Tesco religious discrimination case. Listed on Muslim Connect.

firms.name: Kesar & Co Solicitors
firms.notable: Won multiple Muslim religious discrimination cases including prison headwear removal (ECHR/HRA 1998).

firms.name: Sharma Solicitors
firms.notable: Dedicated religious discrimination page with Muslim-specific examples (hijab, prayer time, Eid).

firms.name: Gulbenkian Andonian Solicitors
firms.notable: Religious freedom specialists. Legal 500 ranked for immigration/human rights. Explicit Muslim discrimination examples.

firms.name: Didlaw
firms.notable: Elizabeth McGlone is a leading light in religion/belief discrimination. Covers hijab and Muslim workplace issues explicitly.

firms.name: Duncan Lewis Solicitors
locations: London (7 offices: Barnet, City, Croydon, Hackney, Harrow, Islington, Shepherds Bush)
firms.address: Suite 7, 2nd Floor, Congress House, Lyon Road, Harrow, HA1 2EN (Islamic Law base)
accreditations: LexisNexis Law Firm of the Year 2024
firms.notable: 50+ offices. Dedicated Islamic Law department. Legal aid available. Both named Islamic team members may have left - verify current team. MIAM-compliant mediation.
firms.data_freshness_warning: Islamic Law team page may be outdated. Contact firm directly to confirm current team.

firms.name: Ascentim Legal Solicitors
firms.address: First Floor, GM04, 2-12 Cambridge Heath Road, London, E1 5QH
firms.notable: Boutique firm. Muslim legal experts educated in Sharia. Free case quote evaluations. Strong East London community ties.

firms.name: I Will Solicitors

team_members.name: Haroon Rashid
team_members.notable: Pioneered UK's first Islamic Will (2000). STEP qualified. BBC featured.

accreditations: STEP (Society of Trust and Estate Practitioners)
firms.notable: UK's leading Islamic Will provider. 12+ team. Pioneered first tax-efficient Islamic Will. Free Islamic Inheritance App. Freephone number. National coverage.
firms.notable_court_of_protection: Property & affairs deputyship only. For welfare deputyship, refer to specialist (e.g. Goodman Ray).

firms.name: Muslim Law (Shariah) Council UK

legal_partner.name: Kuddus Solicitors and Notary Public
legal_partner.address: First Floor Offices, 94 Whitechapel Road, London E1 1JQ

firms.notable: Established 1985. 3,000+ cases. Not a law firm - Islamic advisory/dispute resolution body. Currently has Khula backlogs. Phone lines may be unreliable.

firms.name: Kuddus Solicitors & Notary Public
firms.notable: On panels of ALL Islamic HPP financial institutions. 20+ years experience. Thousands of successful transactions. Works with Al Rayan Bank, Gatehouse Bank, Ahli Islamic, Stride, Nester. Legal partner of Shariah Council UK.

firms.name: Aramas Family Law

team_members.name: Samara Iqbal
team_members.role: Solicitor, Director, Founder. Family law since 2006. Resolution member.

firms.notable: Boutique firm exclusively family law. Trained Islamic Scholar on staff. Approved links to scholars across all fiqh/sects. Fixed fee basis.

firms.name: White Horse Solicitors & Notary Public
addresses: 96 White Horse Ln, London E1 4LR (Stepney Green)
firms.notable: On panels of all major Islamic lending institutions. Leading UK firm for Sharia-compliant property. Operating since Islamic finance became available in UK (2002).

firms.name: MWG Solicitors
firms.notable: Comprehensive Islamic Will services. Full Sharia-compliant estate planning. Inheritance tax advice. Serve clients nationally via video.

firms.name: gunnercooke LLP (Siddique Patel)
firms.notable: One of only a few solicitors to have advised independent Shariah Councils. Practised at two top-100 firms.

firms.name: Slater Heelis
firms.notable: North of England coverage. Also offers Sharia-compliant wills.

firms.name: AM Law Solicitors
firms.notable: Specialist Islamic Wills department. Sharia compliance with English law formalities.

firms.name: Aman Solicitors Advocates
addresses: SPACES 83-85 Baker Street, Marylebone, London W1U 6AG
firms.notable: 20+ years experience. SRA-regulated. Islamic scholars assist with Wills.

firms.name: Batley Law
addresses: 26 Wellington Street, Batley, West Yorkshire WF17 5HU
Grosvenor House, 100-102 Beverley Road, Hull HU3 1YA
firms.notable: Muslim-led conveyancing team. 4.9/5 on 450+ reviews. Online fee calculator. Specialist Islamic finance property transactions.

firms.name: ASL Solicitors (Affinity Seven Law)
firms.address: 140 Drake Street, Rochdale, Greater Manchester OL16 1PS
firms.notable: 4.6 rating on 491+ reviews. 5 offices. Specialist Islamic finance property purchases.

firms.name: Blakewater Certus Solicitors
firms.notable: Works with major Islamic banks: Al Rayan, Ahli United, Arab Banking Corp, National Bank of Kuwait, Al Hilal Islamic Bank UAE, Habib Bank AG Zurich, UNB, Abu Dhabi Islamic Bank, RBS.

firms.name: AFG Law
firms.address: Regent House, Folds Road, Bolton BL1 2RZ
firms.notable: Tailored Islamic mortgage documentation process. Direct liaison with Islamic mortgage lender solicitors.

firms.name: Farani Taylor Solicitors
addresses: Mermaid House, 2nd Floor, 2 Puddle Dock, London EC4V 3DB
112 High Road, Ilford, London, Essex IG1 1BY
firms.notable: Award-winning. Legal 500 ranked. Experienced Islamic Will solicitors with Sharia law knowledge.

firms.name: Curtis Law Solicitors
addresses: Belthorn House, Walker Business Park, Walker Road, Guide, Blackburn BB1 2QE
firms.notable: Expert in Nikah recognition, Talaq, Khula, and Mahr claims under both Islamic and English law.

firms.name: O'Donnell Solicitors
firms.notable: Experience in Islamic divorces. Advise on recognition of Islamic marriages in England & Wales.

firms.name: Stowe Family Law
firms.notable: UK's largest dedicated family law firm. Network of Muslim counsellors, scholars and Sharia Councils. Downloadable Islamic divorce guide. Costs typically £4,000-£25,000.

firms.name: Irwin Mitchell
firms.notable: Major national firm. Islamic Wills AND family law. High net worth / business owner clients. International elements expertise.

firms.name: Reeds Solicitors
firms.notable: 22 offices. Multi-lingual. Handles Talaq, Khula, Tafweedh-e-Talaq.

firms.name: Witan Solicitors
firms.address: Bradford Court, 123-131 Bradford Street, Birmingham B12 0NS
firms.notable: Featured in The Times, Daily Mail, Telegraph. Specialist litigation + Islamic divorce.

firms.name: Makin Dixon Family Solicitors
firms.address: The Wool Exchange, 2nd Floor, 10 Hustlergate, Bradford, West Yorkshire BD1 1RE
accreditations: Law Society Family and Children panel
firms.notable: 10 offices across Yorkshire/Lancashire. Specialist family law. Strong in Bradford area (large Muslim population).

firms.name: Shakespeare Martineau LLP

team_members.name: Mohammed Saqub
team_members.role: Practice Head, Islamic Finance & Real Estate

team_members.name: Noreen Khan-Ghalib
team_members.role: Chartered Legal Executive, Real Estate & Islamic Finance

firms.notable: 10+ years. Act for largest banks across Muslim world including GCC states. Commercial/institutional focus.

firms.name: Taylor Rose Solicitors
firms.notable: One of UK's largest property law firms. All main Sharia-compliant home financing structures.

firms.name: Touchwood Solicitors
firms.notable: Specialist Islamic finance conveyancing. Individual quotes due to complexity of Sharia work.

firms.name: Mullis & Peake
firms.notable: Advise Essex clients on Islamic/halal mortgage structures.

firms.name: Greystone Solicitors
firms.address: 275 Dunstable Road, Unit 3, Luton, Bedfordshire LU4 8BS
firms.notable: Islamic Will solicitors. Sharia-compliant inheritance distribution.

firms.name: YHM Solicitors
firms.notable: Draft wills aligning with Islamic law: asset distribution, guardianship, Sadaqah.

firms.name: Myerson Solicitors

team_members.name: Aalia Ijaz
team_members.role: Senior Associate, STEP qualified, Law Society Private Client. Specialises in Sharia-compliant Islamic Wills.

firms.notable: Islamic Wills complying with both Islamic principles and UK law.

firms.name: Foot Anstey
firms.notable: Active in developing Islamic finance market. Islamic Fintech expertise. Institutional/investment focus.

firms.name: Fitz Solicitors

team_members.name: Nazamah Akhtar
team_members.role: Family Law Solicitor. Qualified since 2017. Resolution member. Also serves at Shariah Council UK.

firms.notable: Solicitor also serves Shariah Council UK. Available via phone, Zoom, Shariah Council office.

firms.name: Bindmans LLP

team_members.name: John Halford
team_members.role: Partner, Head of Public Law & Human Rights

firms.notable: Founded 1974. Nearly 50 years anti-discrimination work. Explicitly challenges targeting of Muslims under Prevent. Hijab ban challenges. Faith school admissions (Supreme Court).

firms.name: Mishcon de Reya LLP
firms.notable: Tell MAMA's legal representatives. Represented family in hijab school exclusion case (Uxbridge 2020). Major City firm.

firms.name: Bhatt Murphy
firms.notable: Est. 1998. Ground-breaking discrimination claims. Notable: Muslim man arrested at 2012 Olympics case. Failures to investigate hate crimes.

firms.name: Landau Law
firms.notable: Free initial consultation. No-win-no-fee (25% + VAT). Uses Muslim examples in content. Nationwide remote coverage. High success rates.

firms.name: Toner Legal
firms.notable: Lists Islam explicitly. Hijab and Ramadan examples. Free consultation. No-win-no-fee. Free compensation calculator.

firms.name: Slater + Gordon
firms.notable: UK's largest consumer law firm. Free initial consultation. No-win-no-fee likely. Nationwide offices. Landmark ethical veganism belief case (2020).

firms.name: Leigh Day
firms.notable: Religion/belief discrimination claims. Actions against police including religious discrimination. Unlawful arrest/detention claims.

firms.name: DPG Law (Deighton Pierce Glynn)
firms.notable: Challenges police misconduct, particularly racial/religious discrimination. Judicial review expertise.

firms.name: Saunders Law
firms.notable: Discrimination at hands of state (police, immigration, prisons). Criminal proceedings for hate crimes. Disciplinary complaints against police.

firms.name: Hodge Jones & Allen
firms.notable: Est. 1977. Housing discrimination (no-win-no-fee available). Civil liberties. Actions against police.

firms.name: Redmans Solicitors
locations: London (9 offices: Richmond, Chiswick, Hammersmith, Fulham, Kingston, Wimbledon, Ealing, Kings Cross, Marylebone)
firms.notable: Free 20-minute consultation. 9 London offices. General religion/belief discrimination.

firms.name: Ringrose Law
firms.notable: East Midlands coverage. 100+ years established. Lists Islam, Sunni, Shia explicitly as protected.

firms.name: Shabina Begum (Goodman Ray)
firms.notable: Partner at Goodman Ray specialising in Court of Protection work, mental capacity, and safeguarding of vulnerable adults. Known for complex welfare deputyship cases including young adults with learning disabilities. Recommended for families seeking culturally-competent Muslim representation at a mainstream specialist firm.

professional_networks.name: Association of Muslim Lawyers (AML)
professional_networks.address: Collaboration House, 77-79 Charlotte Street, London W1T 4PW
professional_networks.notes: Website intermittently down. ~9 employees. 2,717 LinkedIn followers. Campaigns, mentoring, networking. Connected to Lubna Shuja (first Muslim Law Society president 2022-23).

professional_networks.name: Muslim Lawyers Action Group (MLAG)
professional_networks.notes: Largest active Muslim lawyers network. Members get WhatsApp group, CPD events. Has Public Interest Litigation and EDI teams. Aziz Foundation supported.

professional_networks.name: Muslim Lawyers' Hub
professional_networks.notes: Focused on students/aspiring lawyers. Content, mentoring, networking. No practitioner directory.

professional_networks.name: International Ahmadiyya Muslim Lawyers Association (IAMLA)
professional_networks.address: Tahir House, 22 Deer Park Road, Wimbledon, London, SW19 3TL
professional_networks.notes: Ahmadiyya community specifically. Recent symposium at SOAS (Feb 2026).

professional_networks.name: Society of Asian Lawyers (SAL)
professional_networks.notes: Not exclusively Muslim but significant overlap. Collaborates with AML. Est. c.1990.

referral_services.name: Muslim Lawyer UK / Muslim Solicitors
referral_services.address: Room 412, 16 Upper Woburn Place, Euston, London WC1H 0AF
referral_services.status: DORMANT - no updates since 2019. No named lawyers. No SRA info. WordPress 3.0.4.
referral_services.askadil_value: Low. No importable lawyer data. Practice area taxonomy may be useful reference.

referral_services.name: SolicitorConnect
referral_services.status: EARLY_STAGE - claims 500+ Islamic specialists but only 11 firms visible. Some test data.
referral_services.askadil_value: Low. No browsable directory. Enquiry-based matching only.

islamophobia_support.name: Tell MAMA (Measuring Anti-Muslim Attacks)
islamophobia_support.services: Casework, emotional support, legal signposting, advocacy, court attendance, counselling. 60,000+ Muslims supported.

islamophobia_support.name: Islamophobia Response Unit (IRU)
islamophobia_support.services: Free legal guidance (not representation), tribunal attendance support, referrals. 906 incidents investigated 2021-2025.

islamophobia_support.name: CAGE International
islamophobia_support.address: Premier Business Centre, 47-49 Park Royal Road, London NW10 7LQ
islamophobia_support.services: Free casework. Connects Muslims with lawyers. Focus: counter-terrorism, Prevent programme cases.

islamophobia_support.name: Islamic Human Rights Commission (IHRC)
islamophobia_support.services: First Muslim org with in-house legal department. Affordable legal services for discrimination/Islamophobia. UN consultative status.

islamophobia_support.name: Muslim Safety Net (Muslim Women's Network UK)
islamophobia_support.services: Dedicated helpline for anti-Muslim hostility. Emotional support, advice, referrals.

islamophobia_support.name: Liberty
islamophobia_support.services: Human rights info and advice. Cannot take cases but signposts to specialist solicitors.

statistics.source: Law Society diversity data, Bar Council, CILEX, Muslim Lawyers Hub / MLAG research
